_description: Shared design tokens for equity-research-analyst. Single source of truth for charts (Python matplotlib), PDF (WeasyPrint/CSS), and any HTML surfaces. Charts YAML and PDF CSS previously used DIFFERENT hex values for accent/ink/up/down — resolved by preferring the chart-tested values below.

_resolution.accent: Charts #002D72 vs PDF #1a3a6b → kept #002D72 (more authoritative blue, better contrast on white)
_resolution.ink: Charts #1A1A1A vs PDF #1a1e2b → kept #1A1A1A (neutral black, avoids blue cast in PDF body text)
_resolution.up: Charts #0E6E4D vs PDF #15803d → kept #0E6E4D (darker green, better legibility in small chart annotations)
_resolution.down: Charts #CC0000 vs PDF #b91c1c → kept #CC0000 (pure red, higher urgency signal in waterfall / risk tables)

fonts.heading: 'Noto Sans SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', sans-serif
fonts.cjk_sans: 'Noto Sans SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'PingFang SC', 'Noto Sans CJK SC', sans-serif
fonts.cjk_serif: 'Noto Serif SC', 'STSong', 'SimSun', 'Noto Serif CJK SC', serif
